statusHistory.note: Infra-class failure (spawn npx ENOENT) from a 2026-04-24 tempering drain run when the LLM classifier was offline (confidence 0, classification 'unknown'). Not a product bug — npx was missing from the PATH for that subprocess. Subsequent vitest sweeps (5272/5272 pass on 2026-05-16) confirm no underlying defect. Closing as wont-fix per infra-classification policy.
